actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Tottenham Hotspur have released Sonupe, 20, after he failed to make an appearance for the club last season.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Holroyd, 30, arrives on a one-year deal from Macclesfield Town, having scored 13 goals last season - his best return in four years with the Silkmen.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The Cheltenham Gold Cup winner beat rivals Seventh Sky and Southfield Theatre on Sunday to claim his first win since taking steeplechasing's blue riband prize in March.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Japanese firm employs more than 800 people across Northern Ireland.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Cameron James Forster, 21, from Sussex, and Ajvir Singh Sandhu, 25, from Essex, died when the plane came down in a North Yorkshire field.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: More than 1,200 seats will be available across 22 local authorities in Wales on Thursday 4 May.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Edison Mulaj, 19, of New Road, Gravesend, admitted carried out the attack off Parrock Street, Gravesend in the early hours of 22 March.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: James Brendan O'Connor, 70, was hit by a car while walking along the Culmore Road just before 19:00 GMT on Sunday.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Manchester-based estate agents David Currie and Co said the suggestion to rename Plas Glynllifon near Caernarfon as "Newborough Hall" was made by its marketing department.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Speaking in the Irish parliament, Mr Flanagan said that Northern Ireland has been "mired in deadlock over budgetary and financial issues".
